body.description: Implement complete user authentication including JWT, OAuth, and session management.
body.goals:
- Secure API access
- Support OAuth2 providers
- Token refresh flow
- Role-based permissions

body.description: As a user, I want to log in with my credentials so I can access my account.
body.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] POST /auth/login returns JWT
- [ ] Invalid credentials return 401
- [ ] Rate limiting on login endpoint

body.description: Create the login endpoint that validates credentials against the database and returns a signed JWT pair (access + refresh token).
Unit and integration tests for the login endpoint covering success, invalid credentials, rate limiting, and edge cases.
As a new user, I want to register an account so I can start using the application.
body.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] POST /auth/register creates user
- [ ] Email validation
- [ ] Password strength requirements
- [ ] Duplicate email detection

body.description: Create the registration endpoint with email validation, password hashing, and duplicate detection.
Dark mode resets to light mode on page refresh.
body.steps:
1. Enable dark mode via the toggle
2. Refresh the page
3. Observe that light mode is active
body.expected: Dark mode preference should persist across page refreshes using localStorage.
